title: UltraMegaSuperDuperGood
description: This resource pack makes a popular GIF with Thomas Shelby "UltraMegaSuperDuperGood" in your inventory
body:
## Xarosh
This resource pack makes a meme Thomas Shelby (an actor) in your inventory, for example you can view this in the resourse pack's gallery!

## Superduper Xarosh
This resource pack don't requires Optifine !
